Document:
# OPTIONAL ADD-ON CHARGES
These charges may be added to an existing crime and are served in addition to the base sentence.
## Resisting Arrest Refusing or fleeing a lawful arrest or search. - 5 min (refusing orders) | 10 min (fleeing or using force)
## Aiding and Abetting Materially assisting another person in committing a crime. - Same punishment as the crime assisted.
## Disorderly Conduct in Holding Significant disruption while legally detained. - 5 min
## Possession During a Crime Carrying illegal weapons, contraband, or unauthorized equipment while committing another offense. - +5 min + confiscation
## Abuse of Emergency Conditions Using an emergency as cover to commit another crime (e.g. looting during evacuation, stealing weapons during lockdown, impersonating emergency personnel). - +5 min | May escalate the underlying charge if colony safety is endangered.
